race.comment: WHATHAPPENSINVEGAS (1) is a son of Territories out of Marluccio on debit for the Bob & Kane Post yard. Has jumped out strongly at Camperdown in readiness and looks set for a bright start to his career. Drawn awkwardly but can overcome. RUNAWAY LOVE (11) resumes and looks forward enough following an impressive trial win recently. Nicely placed and can get off the mark. SMART AND MIGHTY (2) was in the money two starts back at Albury but was unable to repeat the effort last time at Warrnambool over 1000m. Capable of getting things back on track. HAVILAH (9) comes through the same race, where she finished fourth when resuming. Improvement to come.
